title: Latin American Debt Crisis -> MXN and Regional Collapse
summary: Mexico's 1982 announcement that it could not service debt triggered a broader LatAm debt and FX crisis.
mechanism: Dollar debt, higher US rates, and commodity weakness made external obligations unsustainable, forcing devaluation and restructuring.
causal_chain: currency devalues and regional contagion spreads

outcome.realized_note: Mexico and regional borrowers entered prolonged adjustment and FX weakness.

title: Tequila Crisis -> MXN Devaluation and EM Contagion
summary: Mexico's 1994 peso crisis triggered a sharp devaluation and spilled into wider EM risk pricing.
mechanism: Political stress, reserve loss, and short-term dollar-linked liabilities forced devaluation and crisis financing.
causal_chain: devaluation triggers EM contagion and bailout

outcome.realized_note: MXN collapsed before stabilization under US/IMF support.
outcome.reversal_note: Partial recovery followed the rescue package.

title: Brazil Real Float -> BRL Reset
summary: Brazil abandoned support for the real in 1999, leading to a sharp currency reset after reserve pressure.
mechanism: High rates and reserve loss could not sustain the real, forcing a weaker clearing level.
causal_chain: BRL weakens sharply then stabilizes under new regime

outcome.realized_note: BRL weakened materially before stabilizing under inflation targeting.

title: Argentina Convertibility Collapse -> ARS Devaluation
summary: Argentina's currency board collapsed amid debt distress and recession, causing a massive ARS devaluation.
mechanism: An overvalued peg, recession, and debt burden made the convertibility regime unsustainable.
causal_chain: capital controls and bank stress emerge
peg collapses and ARS devalues sharply

outcome.realized_note: ARS devalued violently and Argentina entered deep crisis.

title: Brazil Lula Election Fears -> BRL Stress
summary: Before Lula took office, markets sold BRL on fears of policy rupture and debt stress.
mechanism: Political uncertainty can widen spreads and weaken FX until policy continuity is established.
causal_chain: BRL weakens until continuity is signaled

outcome.realized_note: BRL came under severe stress before rebounding after pragmatic policy signals.

title: Russia Ruble Crash -> Oil + Sanctions Double Hit
summary: The ruble collapsed in late 2014 under combined pressure from falling oil prices and Western sanctions.
mechanism: A petro-currency can collapse when export revenues fall and sanctions reduce access to external financing.
causal_chain: ruble collapses and central bank hikes aggressively

outcome.realized_note: RUB saw a disorderly collapse before partial stabilization.
outcome.reversal_note: Stabilization came with rates, reserves, and oil recovery.

title: Brazil Recession and Political Crisis -> BRL Collapse
summary: Brazil's deep recession and political crisis drove a severe BRL selloff in 2015.
mechanism: Growth collapse, fiscal stress, and politics combined to erode confidence in BRL assets.

outcome.realized_note: BRL weakened materially before later cyclical recovery.
outcome.reversal_note: Recovery came with commodity stabilization and politics.

title: Egypt Pound Float -> Sharp EGP Devaluation
summary: Egypt floated the pound in 2016 as part of an IMF-backed reform package, causing a large one-off devaluation.
mechanism: A managed currency with large black-market premium often gaps lower when liberalized under IMF programs.
causal_chain: official float is adopted under IMF deal
currency gaps lower and external accounts rebalance

outcome.realized_note: EGP devalued sharply and inflation surged before macro stability improved.

title: Argentina Peso Crisis -> IMF Rescue
summary: Argentina's peso collapsed in 2018 as inflation, twin deficits, and policy credibility failed.
mechanism: High inflation and weak policy credibility made the peso vulnerable to sudden-stop dynamics.
causal_chain: currency collapses and IMF rescue follows

outcome.realized_note: The peso lost substantial value and IMF support became necessary.

title: Turkey Lira Crisis -> Corporate Balance-Sheet Shock
summary: Turkey's lira collapsed in 2018 under external debt stress, inflation, and policy credibility problems.
mechanism: High external borrowing and weak monetary credibility left TRY exposed to sudden stops.
causal_chain: lira collapses and balance-sheet pressure spreads

outcome.realized_note: TRY sold off violently and corporate/financial stress widened.

title: COVID Panic -> South African Rand Collapse
summary: Global COVID panic and commodity demand fears hit the rand hard in March 2020.
mechanism: A high-beta, commodity-linked EM currency can underperform sharply in global risk-off and funding stress.
causal_chain: ZAR weakens sharply before liquidity normalization

outcome.realized_note: ZAR weakened sharply in the COVID panic before later recovering with global liquidity.
outcome.reversal_note: Fed liquidity and commodity rebound aided recovery.

title: Ghana Cedi Crisis -> IMF and Domestic Debt Pressure
summary: Ghana's cedi collapsed in 2022 amid debt stress, reserve weakness, and IMF negotiations.
mechanism: Weak reserves and debt sustainability concerns created a classic EM FX crisis before program support.

forecast.note: Bearish GHS until financing credibility restored.

outcome.realized_note: The cedi weakened heavily before IMF-backed stabilization efforts.

title: Egypt Step Devaluations -> EGP Weakness Under Program Pressure
summary: Egypt repeatedly weakened the pound under IMF pressure to move toward a more flexible exchange rate.
mechanism: Repeated step devaluations occur when external imbalances persist and a one-off move is insufficient.
causal_chain: currency adjusted in steps under program pressure
EGP weakens while inflation remains high

forecast.note: Bearish EGP until full flexibility or funding relief.

outcome.realized_note: EGP weakened in stages as authorities managed adjustment.

title: Nigeria Naira Unification -> Sharp FX Repricing
summary: Nigeria unified multiple exchange rates in 2023, causing a sharp weakening in the naira.
mechanism: A heavily managed multi-window FX system reprices abruptly when unified toward market-clearing levels.
causal_chain: naira weakens sharply as market clears

outcome.realized_note: The naira weakened sharply as the FX regime shifted.
